description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define the DB_DATABASE, DB_DIALECT, DB_HOST, DB_PASSWORD, DB_PORT, DB_SCHEMA, and DB_USERNAME variables for a PostgreSQL connection. In the test stage add a test job that runs npm install then npm run-script test, and saves the coverage/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job (type deploy) that depends on the test job, runs only on the master branch, moves coverage/lcov-report/ into a public/ folder, and publishes the public/ folder as the GitLab Pages artifact. The pipeline follows the default stage ordering with test before deploy.
